# MITRE ATT&CK Coverage Overview
A "dashboard of dashboards": which tactics/techniques each workbook and detection in this repo covers, and the data source behind it. Use this to spot blind spots when planning with the blue team.

content.query: datatable(Workbook:string, Tactic:string, Technique:string, TechniqueId:string, DataSource:string)['Meraki Network Anomaly','Discovery','Network Service Discovery','T1046','CommonSecurityLog','Meraki Network Anomaly','Command and Control','Application Layer Protocol','T1071','CommonSecurityLog','Anomalous Travel','Initial Access / Defense Evasion','Valid Accounts','T1078','SigninLogs','Anomalous Travel','Lateral Movement','Remote Services','T1021','SigninLogs','Sysmon Process Hunting','Execution','Command and Scripting Interpreter','T1059','Event (Sysmon)','Sysmon Process Hunting','Defense Evasion','System Binary Proxy Execution','T1218','Event (Sysmon)','Sysmon Process Hunting','Credential Access','OS Credential Dumping','T1003','Event (Sysmon)','Syslog Monitoring','Persistence','Valid Accounts','T1078','Syslog','Entra Identity Compromise','Credential Access','Brute Force','T1110','SigninLogs','Entra Identity Compromise','Persistence','Modify Authentication Process','T1556','SigninLogs','Sign-in Risk & CA Gaps','Defense Evasion','Modify Authentication Process','T1556','SigninLogs','Lateral Movement','Lateral Movement','Remote Services: RDP','T1021.001','SecurityEvent','Lateral Movement','Lateral Movement','Remote Services: SMB','T1021.002','SecurityEvent','Persistence & PrivEsc','Persistence','Create Account','T1136','SecurityEvent','Persistence & PrivEsc','Persistence','Account Manipulation','T1098','SecurityEvent / AuditLogs','Persistence & PrivEsc','Persistence','Create or Modify System Process','T1543.003','Event','Persistence & PrivEsc','Privilege Escalation','Cloud Accounts','T1078.004','AuditLogs'] | sort by Tactic asc, TechniqueId asc
content.title: Coverage matrix

content.query: datatable(Tactic:string, Techniques:int)['Initial Access',1,'Execution',1,'Persistence',4,'Privilege Escalation',1,'Defense Evasion',3,'Credential Access',2,'Discovery',1,'Lateral Movement',3,'Command and Control',1] | sort by Techniques desc
content.title: Techniques covered per tactic
